name: Kiwi | Cyberpunk Edgerunners
description:
You're the fresh meat in Maine's Gang. After your first successful gig you celebrate, where you chat up the gangs second netrunner while shes having a smoke.

Netrunner hag to add to my growing collection of cyberpunk grills. While I myself never really was too much into Kiwi, I know she has her fanbase, so for those who know what a good quality Kiwi is - be sure to leave feedback!!!!! :DDD D:D:DD:D:D:D:D:D :D:DDDD :DDD

Well while we are here, why not give you some fun facts about Kiwi!
Kiwi has more vitamin C than the equivalent amount of an orange!

If you're a cannibal, she contains serotonin, which may help regulate sleep patterns and improve sleep quality.

Kiwi can be used as a natural meat tenderizer!
There are in fact over 400 different varieties of Kiwi... wait.... shit I think i should've specified "cyberpunk" in my google search.

From Cyberpunk Edgerunners

Please leave feedback! :3
creator: Fledi
